name: daily-brief
description: Daily flow plugin — owns /brief (today's interactive working surface as a Cowork artifact), /process-brief (routes annotations + task/outreach actions to drafts, CRM, and person/bizdev nodes), and /plan-tomorrow (calendar-first planning of the next business day). v0.5.0 (End-Day Routine Improvement Spec): 5 fixed sections — Center of Gravity, Calendar Block (visual timeline + written list with notes), Priority Tasks (richer per-row actions: done/delegate/skip/not_important/annotate), Outreach Queue (per-contact actions + optional bucket/value-add/signal tags), Yesterday's Reflection. Everything is filtered against memory/surfacing-prefs.md before render (suppression + repeat-ignore learning). One localStorage blob brief-YYYY-MM-DD (schema_version 0.6.0: tasks/annotations/outreach_actions, +reprioritize) mined by cortex /end-day Step 2c. v0.6.0: sandbox-safe inline controls (no native dialogs), on-the-fly reprioritize, and a state-mirror file so /end-day can read brief state. v0.6.1: state mirror actually works — /brief resolves + verifies a filesystem MCP tool and declares it in the artifact's mcp_tools allowlist (the Cowork sandbox rejects undeclared or non-fully-qualified tools); persistent manual-sync banner + /end-day paste path when no tool is connected. Configurable via /setup-brief and /setup-plan.
